adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.md.savage_verdict: 457 lines to remind you to take breaks. Your future self needs a break from reading this command more than from hyperfocus.
adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.md.statistical_evidence: 26-point complexity score violates your own 5-point rule by 420%. This command has more layers than a croissant factory.

analyze-project-architecture.md.statistical_evidence: 5 nested thinking layers create cognitive recursion with 47% overhead per layer. That's not intelligence, that's recursion hell.

java-clean-code-generator.md.savage_verdict: 819 lines teaching you to write <20 line functions. This is like a diet book written on donuts.
java-clean-code-generator.md.statistical_evidence: Teaches 'functions must be <20 lines' while being 819 lines itself. Hypocrisy so thick you could mine it for coal.

the_simplicity_paradox.description: Commands teaching simplicity are the most complex

scientific_conclusions.evidence: Commands increase complexity by 560% while teaching simplicity

savage_scientific_commentary: These commands violate their own principles with the consistency of a particle accelerator
The 'java-clean-code-generator' teaching 20-line functions while being 819 lines is like a fitness instructor eating donuts during yoga class
Your complexity scores average 28 while preaching a limit of 5. That's not teaching, that's mathematical comedy
The XML-to-content ratio of 4:1 means 80% of your commands are packaging. Amazon uses less packaging for a paperclip
Having 5 nested thinking layers is like using a telescope to look at another telescope looking at a third telescope to see your keys
The 'reasoning-wrapper' that wraps other wrappers has achieved wrapper singularity - it's wrappers all the way down
60% of your commands need external dependencies to tell you what you already know. That's like needing GPS to find your own bathroom
